---
title: "Presentazione ad uso interno"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

[Apri a schermo intero](slides.html){target="_blank" .btn .btn-primary .btn-sm} | [Scarica PDF](slides.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="slides.html"
  width="100%"
  height="600"
  style="border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;">
</iframe>
```
